title: Build Pipeline: Browser Extension Packaging

use_cases.name: Build Extension Detector
use_cases.description: Reads src/detect-antipatterns.mjs, strips shebang + @browser-strip-start/end blocks, sets IS_BROWSER=true, wraps in IIFE, writes extension/detector/detect.js

use_cases.name: Extract Antipatterns JSON
use_cases.description: Parses ANTIPATTERNS array from detect-antipatterns.mjs via new Function(), maps to {id, name, category, description}, writes extension/detector/antipatterns.json

use_cases.name: Package Extension as ZIP
use_cases.description: Runs execSync('zip -r dist/extension.zip .') from extension/ dir, excludes STORE_LISTING.md and .DS_Store, outputs dist/extension.zip for Chrome Web Store upload

use_cases.name: Generate Extension Icons (PNG)
use_cases.description: Reads extension/icons/icon.svg; for each size in [16,32,48,128]: setViewport, setContent (HTML+SVG), page.screenshot → extension/icons/icon-{size}.png

use_cases.name: Build Standalone Browser Detector
use_cases.description: Same transformations as UC1 (strip shebang, strip markers, IS_BROWSER=true, IIFE wrap), writes src/detect-antipatterns-browser.js for direct <script> tag use

use_cases.name: Create Provider ZIP Bundles
use_cases.description: createProviderZip(providerDir, distDir, providerName): globs **/* with dot:true, ignores .DS_Store, streams into archiver('zip', zlib level 9) → dist/{providerName}.zip. createAllZips() calls for 'universal' and 'universal-prefixed' providers

relationships: Developer / CI <<includes>> Package Extension as ZIP (UC3)
UC1 <<extends>> UC2 (both read same source file detect-antipatterns.mjs)
Developer / CI <<invokes>> Generate Extension Icons (UC4) via generate-extension-icons.js
Developer / CI <<invokes>> Build Standalone Browser Detector (UC5) via build-browser-detector.js
UC1, UC2, UC5 all read from src/detect-antipatterns.mjs (shared universal source)
key_inputs_outputs: INPUT: src/detect-antipatterns.mjs → universal source for UC1, UC2, UC5
INPUT: extension/icons/icon.svg → source SVG for UC4
OUTPUT (UC2): extension/detector/antipatterns.json — rule metadata for DevTools panel
OUTPUT (UC3): dist/extension.zip — Chrome Web Store upload package
code_transformation_steps: 3. Replace 'const IS_BROWSER = ...' → 'const IS_BROWSER = true;' (enables dead-code elimination)
4. Wrap in IIFE: (function(){ if(typeof window==='undefined') return; ... })()
important_notes: build-extension.js uses shell `zip` CLI (not archiver); zip.js/archiver is used for separate provider distribution bundles. UC1 and UC5 perform identical transformations but target different output paths. generate-extension-icons.js requires Puppeteer as dev dependency. build-extension.js is the primary orchestrator for the Chrome Web Store submission artifact.
